1.en: Earlier on inside this course, we spoke very briefly about how Claude actually generates text.
1.zh_tw: 在這門課程的前面，我們非常簡短地談到了 Claude 實際上如何生成文字。
1.zh_cn: 在这门课程的前面，我们非常简短地谈到了 Claude 实际上如何生成文字。

2.en: Remember, we feed some amount of text into Claude, like the words, what do you think?
2.zh_tw: 記住，我們把一些文字餵入 Claude，像是「你覺得怎麼樣」。
2.zh_cn: 记住，我们把一些文字餵入 Claude，像是「你覺得怎麼样」。

3.en: Claude is then going to tokenize this text or break it up into smaller chunks.
3.zh_tw: Claude 接著會把這段文字 token 化，或者把它分解成更小的片段。
3.zh_cn: Claude 接著会把这段文字 token 化，或者把它分解成更小的片段。

4.en: Claude is then going to go through a prediction phase where it decides what possible words could
4.zh_tw: 然後把這些 token 轉換成嵌入向量。
4.zh_cn: 然后把这些 token 转换成嵌入向量。

5.en: come next and assign a probability to each of those different options. Finally, in the sampling
5.zh_tw: 然後把這些嵌入向量上下文化。
5.zh_cn: 然后把这些嵌入向量上下文化。

6.en: phase, a token is actually chosen based upon these probabilities. So in this diagram, I have
6.zh_tw: 最後，生成步驟會為下一個 token 的所有候選詞產生一組機率。
6.zh_cn: 最后，生成步驟会为下一个 token 的所有候选词产生一组机率。

7.en: on the screen. Given inputs of what do you think possible next tokens might be about, would, of,
7.zh_tw: 模型要選擇其中一個候選詞。
7.zh_cn: 模型要选择其中一个候选词。

8.en: and so on. Everything you see here on the right-hand side. Each of these gets assigned a probability.
8.zh_tw: 溫度參數控制的就是這裡的選擇過程。
8.zh_cn: 溫度参数控制的就是这里的选择过程。

9.en: And then maybe in this case, Claude settles on about as being the best possible next token.
9.zh_tw: 溫度是一個介於 0 和 1 之間的值。
9.zh_cn: 溫度是一个介於 0 和 1 之间的值。

10.en: So we would end up with the phrase, what do you think about? This entire process is then repeated
10.zh_tw: 低溫度，接近 0，會使模型傾向選擇機率最高的候選詞。
10.zh_cn: 低溫度，接近 0，会使模型傾向选择机率最高的候选词。

11.en: to complete the sentence or complete the entire message. Now, just to make sure things are really
11.zh_tw: 這使得輸出更可預測和確定性。
11.zh_cn: 这使得输出更可预测和确定性。

12.en: clear, the numbers I'm showing here are probabilities, the percentage chance of each token being
12.zh_tw: 高溫度，接近 1，會使模型更願意選擇機率較低的候選詞。
12.zh_cn: 高溫度，接近 1，会使模型更愿意选择机率較低的候选词。

13.en: selected. Now, just to make things a little bit more clear with these probabilities, I'm going to
13.zh_tw: 這使得輸出更有創意和多樣。
13.zh_cn: 这使得输出更有创意和多样。

14.en: display them in a chart for the rest of this video. So still the same probabilities, just in a format
14.zh_tw: 讓我給你看一個快速的示範。
14.zh_cn: 让我给你看一个快速的示范。

15.en: that's easier for us to understand. You'll also notice I've kind of sorted them from left to right.
15.zh_tw: 我要用溫度 0 向 Claude 發送同樣的請求五次。
15.zh_cn: 我要用溫度 0 向 Claude 发送同样的请求五次。

16.en: There's no actual internal sorting going on. I'm just sorting them, greatest to least probability,
16.zh_tw: 然後用溫度 1 做同樣的事。
16.zh_cn: 然后用溫度 1 做同样的事。

17.en: just to make this chart a little bit easier to understand. So now that we have a reminder on how
17.zh_tw: 讓我們看看結果有什麼不同。
17.zh_cn: 让我们看看结果有什麼不同。

18.en: Claude generates text, I want to show you one way that we can directly influence these probabilities
18.zh_tw: 好的，溫度為 0 時，我要問 Claude 為什麼天空是藍色的。
18.zh_cn: 好的，溫度为 0 时，我要问 Claude 为什麼天空是蓝色的。

19.en: and control which token Claude might actually decide to select. So we can control these probabilities

20.en: using a parameter called temperature. Temperature is a decimal value between zero and one that we
20.zh_tw: 你可以看到每次回應幾乎完全相同。
20.zh_cn: 你可以看到每次回应幾乎完全相同。

21.en: provide when we make our model call. So whenever we call that converse function, temperature is going
21.zh_tw: 這是因為低溫度使模型總是選擇最高機率的下一個 token。
21.zh_cn: 这是因为低溫度使模型总是选择最高机率的下一个 token。

22.en: to influence the exact distribution of probabilities. This is a little bit tricky to understand. So you
22.zh_tw: 所以它基本上走的是相同的路徑。
22.zh_cn: 所以它基本上走的是相同的路徑。

23.en: can look at the plot or these charts I've got right here, or alternatively, I put together a quick little
23.zh_tw: 現在讓我把溫度改為 1 再試一次。
23.zh_cn: 现在让我把溫度改为 1 再试一次。

24.en: demo with Claude itself, just to give you a better idea of what's going on. So let me show you that demo.

25.en: Okay, so this is the same chart we were just looking at in that diagram a moment ago. Whenever we
25.zh_tw: 每次的回應可能都不太一樣。
25.zh_cn: 每次的回应可能都不太一样。

26.en: provide a temperature value going down to zero, so you'll see I got temperature right here,
26.zh_tw: 有些可能會用不同的類比或範例。
26.zh_cn: 有些可能会用不同的类比或范例。

27.en: the highest probability becomes more likely to occur. So our highest probability was about and it's going
27.zh_tw: 有些可能會從不同的角度來解釋。
27.zh_cn: 有些可能会从不同的角度來解釋。

28.en: to increase all the way up to 100%. So at temperatures of zero, we start to get what we call deterministic
28.zh_tw: 這就是高溫度帶來的多樣性。
28.zh_cn: 这就是高溫度帶來的多样性。

29.en: output, where we always select the token that has the highest initial probability. Then as we start to
29.zh_tw: 那麼你什麼時候該用低溫度，什麼時候該用高溫度呢？
29.zh_cn: 那麼你什麼时候该用低溫度，什麼时候该用高溫度呢？

30.en: increase our temperature, it increases the chances of us selecting a token that has a lower initial
30.zh_tw: 一般來說，如果你的任務需要準確性和一致性，就用低溫度。
30.zh_cn: 一般來说，如果你的任务需要准确性和一致性，就用低溫度。

31.en: probability. So we go from maybe having a zero percent chance of selecting we as the next
31.zh_tw: 例如，資料擷取、分類、或程式碼生成，
31.zh_cn: 例如，数据提取、分类、或代码生成，

32.en: token, all the way up to say 9%. So this is the theory behind temperature. But what does this
32.zh_tw: 你想要可預測和可靠的輸出。
32.zh_cn: 你想要可预测和可靠的输出。

33.en: actually mean in the real world? Well, we start to use different values of temperature, given the
33.zh_tw: 如果你的任務需要創意和多樣性，就用高溫度。
33.zh_cn: 如果你的任务需要创意和多样性，就用高溫度。

34.en: actual task that we're trying to complete. These are some example ranges and tasks that might fit into
34.zh_tw: 例如，創意寫作、腦力激盪、或故事生成。
34.zh_cn: 例如，创意写作、脑力激盪、或故事生成。

35.en: each sample range. For something like say data extraction, we really don't want a lot of randomness
35.zh_tw: 在 API 中設定溫度非常簡單。
35.zh_cn: 在 API 中设定溫度非常简单。

36.en: or creativity. If we give Claude a big chunk of text and ask it to extract very specific pieces of
36.zh_tw: 你只需要在 create 函式中加入 temperature 參數。
36.zh_cn: 你只需要在 create 函数中加入 temperature 参数。

37.en: information, no real creativity required there whatsoever. We just want Claude to look at the

38.en: exact text we provided and pull out the most relevant information. And then on the higher
38.zh_tw: 我在 create 呼叫中加入 temperature=0。
38.zh_cn: 我在 create 调用中加入 temperature=0。

39.en: temperature side, this is where we start to get more creative. We start to see less common tokens

40.en: being used. We probably are going to want to use higher temperatures anytime we are doing any kind of
40.zh_tw: 你也可以用浮點數像 0.5 或 0.7。
40.zh_cn: 你也可以用浮点数像 0.5 或 0.7。

41.en: really creative focus task, such as brainstorming, writing, maybe doing some really creative marketing,
41.zh_tw: 如果你不指定溫度，Claude 會使用預設值 1。
41.zh_cn: 如果你不指定溫度，Claude 会使用默认值 1。

42.en: or something like a joke where a lot of jokes really depend upon using words in ways that are
42.zh_tw: 所以預設行為是使用較高的溫度，也就是更多的多樣性。
42.zh_cn: 所以默认行为是使用較高的溫度，也就是更多的多样性。

43.en: not always quite expected. Now that we understand what temperature is all about, let's go back over

44.en: to our notebook and understand how we can adjust temperature on the fly. I would like to update
44.zh_tw: 即使溫度為 0，你可能偶爾還是會看到些微的變化。
44.zh_cn: 即使溫度为 0，你可能偶尔还是会看到些微的变化。

45.en: our chat function so that it takes in a temperature argument that we're going to pass through to our

46.en: create function call. So inside of the list of arguments, I'm going to add in temperature,
46.zh_tw: 溫度為 0 並不保證百分之百完全相同的輸出。
46.zh_cn: 溫度为 0 並不保证百分之百完全相同的输出。

47.en: and I'm going to default my temperature to be 1.0. So I want to fall on the more creative side of

48.en: things. Then I'm going to take in that argument and add it into the params object as temperature.
48.zh_tw: 對於大多數實際應用來說，
48.zh_cn: 对於大多数实际应用來说，

49.en: And that's all we have to do to add in support for adjusting the temperature inside of our application.
49.zh_tw: 你大概會想用中等的溫度。
49.zh_cn: 你大概会想用中等的溫度。

50.en: So now to test this out, I'm going to rerun this cell. I'm then going to go down to the next cell,
50.zh_tw: 可能在 0.3 到 0.7 之間。
50.zh_cn: 可能在 0.3 到 0.7 之间。

51.en: and I'm going to ask Claude to generate a one-sentence movie idea. And initially, I'm going to provide
51.zh_tw: 這給你可靠性和多樣性之間的良好平衡。
51.zh_cn: 这给你可靠性和多样性之间的良好平衡。

52.en: a temperature of 0.0. So now in theory, I should be getting back movie ideas that always tend to be
52.zh_tw: 但當然，最好的溫度取決於你的特定使用場景。
52.zh_cn: 但当然，最好的溫度取决於你的特定使用场景。

53.en: a little bit similar in nature. So I'm going to run this. And the first time I'm going to get back
53.zh_tw: 我建議你用不同的值做實驗來找到最適合你需求的。
53.zh_cn: 我建议你用不同的值做实验來找到最适合你需求的。

54.en: a time-traveling archaeologist. You're going to see that this is a very common pattern, at least for me.
54.zh_tw: 好的，讓我快速總結一下。
54.zh_cn: 好的，让我快速总结一下。

55.en: I very often, when I have a temperature of zero, get movie ideas that are about a time-traveling
55.zh_tw: 溫度控制文字生成中的隨機性。
55.zh_cn: 溫度控制文字生成中的随机性。

56.en: something. So if I run this again, I'm probably going to see another time-traveling thing. Yep,
56.zh_tw: 低溫度意味著更可預測的輸出。
56.zh_cn: 低溫度意味著更可预测的输出。

57.en: same thing. Maybe one more time. And yeah, same kind of idea, a jaded time-traveling historian.
57.zh_tw: 高溫度意味著更有創意和多樣的輸出。
57.zh_cn: 高溫度意味著更有创意和多样的输出。

58.en: Let's now try adjusting our temperature a little bit to hopefully encourage Claude to give us some
58.zh_tw: 你應該根據你的任務選擇適當的溫度。
58.zh_cn: 你应该根据你的任务选择适当的溫度。

59.en: more original or creative ideas. I'm going to try adjusting my temperature up to 1.0. Now,
59.zh_tw: 資料擷取和程式碼生成用低溫度。
59.zh_cn: 数据提取和代码生成用低溫度。

60.en: if I run this again, I hopefully will not get an idea about a jaded time-traveler or something like

61.en: that. And almost immediately, you can see that I do. So this is something to be aware of.
61.zh_tw: 而且如果你不確定，就從預設值開始然後做調整。
61.zh_cn: 而且如果你不确定，就从默认值开始然后做调整。

62.en: Just because you dial up the temperature doesn't mean you're always going to get dramatically

63.en: different ideas. It just increases the chances of getting a different one. So if I run this again,
63.zh_tw: 到目前為止這個模組中，
63.zh_cn: 到目前为止这个模组中，

64.en: I might end up seeing a more creative idea. Okay, that's definitely more creative. Nothing about
64.zh_tw: 我們已經涵蓋了相當多的基礎知識。
64.zh_cn: 我们已经涵蓋了相当多的基础知识。

65.en: time-travel this time. And we get one more test here. And there we go. Again, not about a time-traveler
65.zh_tw: 我們了解了 API 存取的完整生命週期。
65.zh_cn: 我们了解了 API 访问的完整生命週期。

66.en: or anything like that. All right, so that is temperature. Now, remember, there's some general

67.en: guidance here. Whenever we are doing tasks that require less creativity, or whenever we want to have a

68.en: very deterministic output, we want to use that lower temperature value. And whenever we have a

69.en: task that requires a little bit more creativity, that's when we want to start to think about dialing

70.en: up the temperature a little bit.
70.zh_tw: 這些都是你用 Claude API 建構任何東西時的核心基礎。
70.zh_cn: 这些都是你用 Claude API 建构任何東西时的核心基础。
